title: The Aussie veterans turning to ancient psychedelics in a last ditch hope of curing PTSD and drug addictions
description: Adam Shand travels to Zimbabwe to take part in a psychedelic drug ritual which Aussie combat veterans are turning to in a last ditch hope to cure drug addictions and ease post traumatic stress.
